objective: Implement PLAN_STABILITY_AND_TOPOLOGY Phase 6 agent tool upgrades with topology_map, index_status, refresh_index, typed engine contracts, MCP handlers, and regression tests

evaluator.command: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build
evaluator.contract: PASS when TypeScript check, tests proving topology_map returns owner/topology evidence, index_status reports freshness counts, refresh_index clears stale/pending state, MCP tool definitions/handlers expose the new tools, and production build pass

lastValidation.evidence: Implemented Phase 6 agent tool upgrades: added IndexStatus, TopologyMap, and TopologyMapRequest contracts; RagCodeEngine now supports refreshIndex, indexStatus, and topologyMap; MCP definitions and callTool handlers expose refresh_index, index_status, and topology_map; tests cover tool listing, freshness counts, refresh clearing stale/pending state, and topology_map owner/topology evidence. Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.
